creator: kmacy@FreeBSD.org
text:
---------- Forwarded message ----------
 From: K. Macy <kmacy@freebsd.org>
 Date: Mon, Jan 23, 2012 at 8:28 PM
 Subject: kern/155604: [flowtable] Flowtable excessively caches dest
 MAC addresses for outgoing traffic
 To: spolyack@collaborativefusion.com
 Cc: Glebius@freebsd.org, killing@multiplay.co.uk
 
 
 I have updated the PR with a simple inline patch which should correct
 the problem. If you are able to test, please do.
 
 Cheers
 
 http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=155604
